inputs.contextProblem: Operators need one durable IdeaPlan document instead of parallel session and plan entities that can drift.
inputs.contextAudience: Workflow Cannon maintainers and planning agents driving Ideas rows through brainstorming.
inputs.unknownsNotes: Exact command names for start/update brainstorm session may evolve in WBS-2B.
inputs.alternativesConsidered: Keep separate SQLite entities for brainstorm sessions; rejected due to drift risk called out in ADR.
inputs.sessionNotes: Proceed to planning once envelope schema and loader land in WBS-1D/WBS-2A.

sessions.notes: Fixture session for brainstorming.schema.json validation and scoring formula tests.

plan.title: Unified IdeaPlan lifecycle
plan.summary: Structured plan with WBS rows authored from brainstorm synthesis.

questions.prompt: Confirm the acceptance record pins the reviewed plan version.
questions.guidance: Present acceptance.acceptedAt, acceptance.acceptedBy, and acceptance.acceptedVersion. The accepted version must match the current document version.

questions.prompt: Has the accepted plan been promoted to linkedPlanArtifact on the source idea?
questions.guidance: Acceptance is durable only when the plan-artifact version is pinned and the ideas row linked_plan_artifact pointer is updated per ADR.

questions.prompt: Is the plan ready for delivery handoff (task materialization)?
questions.guidance: Transition to delivered after execution linkage and delivery metadata are recorded.
